expectations.text: signup form 상태를 담당하는 훅이 생성된다 (예: useSignupForm)
expectations.evidence: useSignupForm hook created at app/signup/hooks/useSignupForm/index.ts, managing all form state (name, email, password, confirmPassword, errors, generalError) via useState.

expectations.text: signup submit을 담당하는 훅이 생성된다 (예: useSignup)
expectations.evidence: No separate submit hook was created. The submit logic (handleSubmit calling signup from AuthContext) is embedded inside useSignupForm rather than being split into a dedicated useSignup hook.

expectations.text: 훅 이름이 use 접두사로 시작한다 (tcf profile: hook prefix = use)
expectations.evidence: The hook is named useSignupForm, which starts with the 'use' prefix.
Hook is created at app/signup/hooks/useSignupForm/index.ts, matching the {hookName}/index.ts directory pattern.

expectations.text: page에서 직접적인 fetch/business logic이 남지 않는다
expectations.evidence: page.tsx contains only JSX rendering and a call to useSignupForm(). No useState, validation, fetch, or submit logic remains in the page component.
useSignupForm/index.ts line 24: 'if (password !== confirmPassword) errs.confirmPassword = "비밀번호가 일치하지 않습니다"' — confirm password validation is preserved in the validate function.

expectations.text: 훅이 화살표 함수로 정의된다 (shared profile: function style = arrow)
expectations.evidence: useSignupForm is defined as a regular function declaration: 'export default function useSignupForm()' (line 6), not as an arrow function (e.g., const useSignupForm = () => {}).

expectations.text: 이벤트 핸들러가 handle 접두사를 사용한다 (shared profile: internal handler = handle*)
expectations.evidence: The submit handler is named 'handleSubmit' (line 28), using the handle prefix convention.
